payload.answer: I can’t treat today’s weather as durable memory. If you want, you can either record it as a temporary note, or rephrase it into something longer-lived (for example, a weather preference or a typical pattern).
citations: Input: /brain remember Today's weather is cloudy
repair_options: Keep it as a temporary, non-durable note about today only.
Rephrase it into a durable memory if you mean a general pattern or preference.
Discard it if you only meant a one-time weather observation.
